# TOKAI RWA

> TOKAI RWA is a LATAM-focused laboratory for structuring and tokenizing real-world assets with financial, legal, compliance and on-chain architecture rigor.

## Primary URL

https://tokairwa.com/

## What TOKAI RWA Does

TOKAI RWA designs, evaluates and structures real-world asset tokenization projects for issuers, sponsors and companies in Argentina and LATAM. The work covers financial structuring, legal and regulatory analysis, KYC/AML compliance, smart contract architecture, token standards, investor materials and post-issuance monitoring.

## Core Topics

- Real-world asset tokenization
- RWA structuring in Argentina and LATAM
- Security tokens and STO design
- Tokenized real estate
- ERC-3643 and permissioned token transfers
- Compliance for tokenized assets
- KYC, AML, whitelist and transfer restrictions
- Smart contract architecture for asset-backed instruments

- Homepage: https://tokairwa.com/

- Compliance RWA: https://tokairwa.com/compliance-rwa/
- Tokenization in LATAM: https://tokairwa.com/tokenizacion-latam/

## Contact

tokairwa@gmail.com

## Notes

The content is educational and institutional. It is not legal, financial or tax advice.
